name: Matchmaker: Dungeon Heart
short_description: Matchmaker: Dungeon Heart is a narrative-driven dating & romance sim featuring match-3 gameplay. Train with the monstrous inhabitants of the dungeon. You may find yourself falling in love.
detailed_description:
After a battle against a terrible beast, death takes you… but it does not keep you. Awoken by a powerful Lich under the light of the two moons, you are given a grave task: Safeguard the ruins of Torkadall, the Lich’s home, and all its inhabitants from a deadly force that threatens their, and your, very existence. With no memory of your past life and no direction in this new one, you accept the Lich’s invitation.

Match-3 your way to victory

Match motes to inflict damage, heal, focus yourself, and even make money. Use items and special moves to your advantage and inflict great damage on your foes. You will need to pay attention to your opponent’s forecasted attacks to make sure your strategy is perfectly suited to handling whatever they throw at you.

Get to know monsters

Get to know nine dateable monsters. Who will you click with? From a sweet but imposing minotaur, to a caring but fierce dragon, there’s a beasty for everyone. Starting as strangers, you will get to know the inhabitants of the dungeon and eventually get to take them on rendezvous where your relationship can develop into something more.

Manage the dungeon

Use your time wisely. Who will you train and spend time with each day? Each day you will be able to take a certain number of actions. Is it better to spread your time across all the dungeon's inhabitants, or maximise your time with your favourite few? Should you focus on your own combat potential, or on the good of the many?

Defeat the Forces of Light

The Forces of Light come knocking at the dungeon's doors, and they won't be leaving until they burn it down. You must make sure the dungeon is prepared to fight back when the pesky paladins of light come to visit. Without your help, the dungeon stands no chance.
